title: Boundless Horizons
description: All the best and custom mods from Forge and Fabric perfectly balanced. Running on 1.21 NeoForge.
body:
![Boundless Horizons Logo Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41de2c0730ceb9629314ef9fd102c39233cf9c2a.webp) # Your favourite mods in one place! ## Host Multiplayer! (Free or paid) [🚀**Multiplayer Wiki entry**](https://git.vaporvee.com/vaporvee/BoundlessHorizons/wiki/How-to-host-Multiplayer)
[Download Server Jar](https://git.vaporvee.com/vaporvee/BoundlessHorizons/releases/latest/download/boundless-server.jar)
### My new Mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/loadsupport ## Overview Welcome to **Boundless Horizons**, the ultimate modpack designed for Minecraft 1.21! Whether you’re a casual player or a modding enthusiast, this modpack merges the best of Forge, Fabric, and the innovative NeoForge modloader, which now has Fabric compatibility powered by Sinytra mods. Dive into a boundless world of adventure, high-tech automation, and creativity, all packed into one modern, streamlined experience. With 300+ carefully selected and custom coded mods, Boundless Horizons delivers a fun Minecraft 1.21 modding journey perfect for players looking for a modpack that combines all the mods you love. Explore new biomes, build advanced machinery, or set up an optimized multiplayer server, all while enjoying high-performance gameplay. ## Planned Features for Boundless Horizons Modpack I am committed to delivering continuous updates and new features to ensure Boundless Horizons remains one of the best Minecraft modpacks. Planned updates include: - 🧩 Full Quest System: Engage in immersive quests that guide your gameplay. - 🔗 Enhanced Mod Balancing: Crafting recipes will depend on multiple mods, adding strategic depth to the gameplay. - ✅ Automated Crafting Todo List: Inspired by games like Satisfactory, this feature will help you plan and execute each crafting step to your desired item. - 🦊 More NeoForge Mods: Ongoing mod porting to NeoForge and/or Minecraft 1.21 Fabric. - 🏝️ Skyblock Version: The development for it started before this Modpack (Requires a custom mod which is not finished yet). ## Features of Boundless Horizons Modpack for Minecraft 1.21 ### 🏞️ Explore & Adventure Like Never Before Explore the world of Minecraft 1.21 with an unparalleled selection of exploration and adventure mods. From new biomes to stunning structures, you'll never tire of the journey: - Biomes O' Plenty and Oh The Biomes We've Gone expand the world with new, exciting biomes. - Repurposed Structures and Additional Structures add depth with dungeons, villages, and more. - Enhance your world’s ambiance with AmbientSounds, Sounds by IMB11, and Presence Footsteps. ### ⚙️ High-Tech Automation, Industry, and Security For players who love Minecraft’s automation and technology mods, Boundless Horizons delivers powerful tools for creating massive factories, complex machines, and robust defenses: - Applied Energistics 2, Mekanism, and EnderIO bring advanced storage networks, automation tools, and energy systems. - Modern Industrialization introduces large-scale machinery for automation, while Powah! and Custom Machinery provide flexible energy management and automation solutions. - Keep your base secure with SecurityCraft, adding keycards, cameras, and a variety of traps to defend your stuff. ### 🔮 Magic & Mystical Mods Immerse yourself in the world of magic with a rich selection of magic mods that add spells, rituals, and enchanting experiences to your Minecraft adventure: - Occultism: Perform rituals to summon spirits, or demons, from "The Other Place" to assist you in tasks and adventures. Or create powerful enchanted tools and jewelry. - Relics: Discover ancient magical artifacts that grant powerful abilities. - Easy Magic: Simplifies the process of enchanting, potion brewing, and other magical activities. ### ⚡ Optimized Performance for a Smoother Minecraft Experience Boundless Horizons is built for performance, ensuring smooth gameplay even with 300+ mods running at once: - Sodium, FerriteCore, and Entity Culling maximize frame rates, even on lower-end systems. - Distant Horizons allows for extended render distances without sacrificing performance. - Potatoptimize and ModernFix further optimize Minecraft’s resource usage for efficient, smooth performance. ### 🎮 Multiplayer-Ready Minecraft Modpack Boundless Horizons is perfect for multiplayer Minecraft: - Simple Voice Chat: Proximity-based in-game voice chat for easier team communication. - Emojiful and Chat Heads: Bring more fun and expressiveness to multiplayer chats. - Open Parties and Claims: Protect your builds and invite friends to co-op safely and securely. - Waterframes: Customize your world by displaying custom images and videos inside Minecraft. --- ## Addressing Mod Warnings in Minecraft 1.21 While Minecraft 1.21.1 is a newer release, I ensure that the mods included in Boundless Horizons are tested for compatibility. I've included alpha versions of some mods and have run tests to verify that everything works as intended. Should you encounter any issues, please report them via the Boundless Horizons Issue Tracker on GitHub, or submit feedback directly to the respective mod developers. I recommend making backups, and I will soon enable automatic backups for extra safety. --- ## Why Choose Boundless Horizons Modpack? Boundless Horizons is the ideal choice for Minecraft players who want the best of both Forge and Fabric mods in one seamless experience. Whether you're looking to explore, build, automate, or just enjoy smoother gameplay with friends, this modpack delivers it all. Download Boundless Horizons today and start your Minecraft journey with 300+ of the best mods for a better Minecraft 1.21 experience.
